text:
active listening is a skill. skills are trained. training is reps.

11.9 million people in communities about being better listeners. zero apps giving them daily reps.

imagine: one prompt per day. one listening exercise. one streak to maintain.

same mechanic as a push-up counter. different muscle group.

the relationship workout nobody programmed:

day 1: ask one question you don't know the answer to.
day 7: notice one thing your partner did without being asked.
day 30: the streak is a habit. the habit is attention.
day 90: you're a different person in every conversation.

progressive overload works on emotional intelligence too. nobody built the app for it yet.

seasonal periodization for cold outreach:

spring: HVAC, landscaping, pool services
summer: wedding vendors, travel, moving companies
fall: tax prep (early bird), holiday retail
winter: fitness (new year), home renovation

the lead machine finds businesses with bad websites in the exact season they need customers most.

timing is a rep most people skip.
